chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْعِيدَيْنِ وَ الْخُطْبَةِ فِيهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 88 – Salāt of the two Eids and the sermon in these two

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/433)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/433)
text: قِيلَ لِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يَوْمَ فِطْرٍ أَوْ يَوْمَ أَضْحًى لَوْ صَلَّيْتَ فِي مَسْجِدِكَ فَقَالَ إِنِّي لَأُحِبُّ أَنْ أَبْرُزَ إِلَى آفَاقِ السَّمَاءِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Al-Mufazzal Bin Salih, from Lays Al-Murady,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said, ‘It was said to Rasool-Allahsaww on the day of (Eid) Al-Fitr or (Eid) Al-Az’ha, ‘If only yousaww would pray Salāt in yoursaww Masjid?’ So hesaww said: ‘Isaww loved to come out to (look at) the horizons of the sky’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from al-Mufaddal ibn Salih from Layth al-Muradiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that once it was said to the Messenger of Allah, ‘Would that you perform Salah (prayer) on al-Fitr or al-Adha’ days in your Masjid!’ The Messenger of Allah said, ‘I love to come out for the horizons of the sky.’”
